results.title: Recharts
results.description: Recharts is a Redefined chart library built with React and D3, enabling developers to easily create charts in React applications using declarative components and native SVG support.

results.title: EvilCharts
results.description: EvilCharts is a modern, customizable chart library for React and Next.js applications, featuring visually stunning, interactive, and responsive data visualizations with pre-designed components and multiple chart types.

results.title: Recharts To PNG
results.description: A React hook library that wraps html2canvas to convert any HTML element, including Recharts charts, to a PNG or JPEG image.

results.title: Vue Google Charts
results.description: A reactive Vue.js wrapper for the Google Charts library, enabling easy integration and automatic redrawing of charts with data changes.

results.title: Highcharts
results.description: Highcharts is a JavaScript charting library that allows developers to create interactive and responsive charts for web applications.

results.title: lyCharts
results.description: lyCharts is a next-generation cross-platform chart library for the uni-app ecosystem, offering comprehensive components and convenient interfaces.

results.title: Seat Charts
results.description: Seat Charts is a React component library for creating interactive bus and event seating charts, supporting various seat statuses, gender-based reservations, and custom data formats.

results.title: React Stockcharts
results.description: Highly customizable stock charts with ReactJS and d3

results.title: ApexCharts
results.description: ApexCharts is a modern charting library that provides 20+ interactive chart types with features like animations, annotations, zooming, and responsive design for web applications.

results.title: LiveCharts2
results.description: LiveCharts2 is an extremely flexible, cross-platform data visualization library for .NET, designed to run everywhere with improved flexibility and minimal effort to port to new platforms.

results.title: ReGraph
results.description: ReGraph is a library of React components and analysis functions for client-side visualization of connected data, featuring a chart for relationships and a time bar for events over time.

results.title: Reachat
results.description: Reachat is a highly customizable and extensible chat UI library that handles message rendering, user interactions, and layout management, supporting rich media and multi-provider integration.

results.title: FLCharts
results.description: FLCharts is an easy-to-use and highly customizable Swift library for building animated bar, line, and pie charts with features like custom views, highlighting, and card embedding.

results.title: Charts
results.description: Charts is a PHP (Laravel) library designed to handle all chart creation and management within applications, supporting multiple charting libraries with AJAX loading capabilities.

results.title: React Native Wagmi Charts
results.description: A React Native charting library offering line and candlestick charts with interactive features, built with React Native Reanimated 2 for smooth animations.

results.title: ReGreet
results.description: ReGreet is a clean and customizable GTK-based greeter for greetd, written in Rust using Relm4, designed to run under a Wayland compositor with extensive customization options for appearance and session management.

results.title: Rosen
results.description: Rosen is a lightweight and easy-to-use React charting library built with D3.js and Tailwind, designed for simple copy-paste integration into JavaScript and TypeScript projects.

results.title: React Financial Charts
results.description: React Financial Charts is a library for creating financial charts with various chart types, technical indicators, and drawing objects, designed to work out of the box.

results.title: OpenTiny HUICharts
results.description: OpenTiny HUICharts 是一套功能强大的前端可视化图表库，为Web开发者提供了40多个图表组件，支持主题定制、响应式和无障碍等丰富的能力，且完全兼容 ECharts 的 API。

results.title: Highcharts React
results.description: The official Highcharts supported wrapper for React

results.title: React Native Gifted Charts
results.description: A comprehensive React Native library for creating Bar, Line, Area, Pie, Donut, Stacked Bar, Population Pyramid, and Radar charts with 2D, 3D, gradient, and animation features.

results.title: Replecs
results.description: Replecs is a fast, flexible, and feature-rich runtime/library agnostic replication library for ECS, offering fine-controlled per-entity replication, granular player filtering, and bandwidth-efficient buffer-based synchronization.

results.title: Recurr
results.description: Recurr is a PHP library for working with recurrence rules (RRULE) and converting them into DateTime objects, inspired by rrule.js.

results.title: Rebrowser Patches
results.description: Patches for undetectable browser automation that enhance Puppeteer and Playwright by fixing source code to prevent detection by anti-bot software.

results.title: ECharts for React
results.description: ⛳️  Apache ECharts components for React wrapper. 一个简单的 Apache echarts 的 React 封装。

results.title: RedisShake
results.description: RedisShake is a tool for data migration and processing for Redis-like databases, supporting sync, scan, and restore modes for migration, as well as data filtering and modification using Lua scripts, compatible with various Redis deployments.

results.title: Repr
results.description: Reconstructible string representations and more

results.title: Rebuy
results.description: Rebuy is an e-commerce personalization and merchandising platform that provides tools for product recommendations, smart carts, analytics, and integrations to optimize online storefronts.

results.title: RecTools
results.description: RecTools is an easy-to-use Python library designed to simplify and accelerate the process of building recommender systems, offering various models including advanced transformer-based architectures like HSTU, SASRec, and BERT4Rec.

results.title: ReSwift
results.description: ReSwift is a Swift implementation of the unidirectional data flow architecture, inspired by Redux, for managing application state, views, and state changes.
